commit_files_commit_paths_unique.name: commit_files_commit_paths_unique
commit_files_commit_paths_unique.where: "commit_files"."old_path" is not null and "commit_files"."new_path" is not null

commit_files_commit_added_new_unique.name: commit_files_commit_added_new_unique
commit_files_commit_added_new_unique.where: "commit_files"."old_path" is null and "commit_files"."new_path" is not null

commit_files_commit_deleted_old_unique.name: commit_files_commit_deleted_old_unique
commit_files_commit_deleted_old_unique.where: "commit_files"."old_path" is not null and "commit_files"."new_path" is null

commit_files_path_present_check.name: commit_files_path_present_check
commit_files_path_present_check.value: "commit_files"."old_path" is not null or "commit_files"."new_path" is not null

commit_files_status_override_reason_chec.name: commit_files_status_override_reason_check
commit_files_status_override_reason_chec.value: ("commit_files"."status_override" is null and "commit_files"."status_override_reason" is null and "commit_files"."status_override_actor_type" is null and "commit_files"."status_override_at" is null) or ("commit_files"."status_override" is not null and length(trim(coalesce("commit_files"."status_override_reason", ''))) > 0 and "commit_files"."status_override_actor_type" is not null and "commit_files"."status_override_at" is not null)

commits_status_override_reason_check.name: commits_status_override_reason_check
commits_status_override_reason_check.value: ("commits"."status_override" is null and "commits"."status_override_reason" is null and "commits"."status_override_actor_type" is null and "commits"."status_override_at" is null) or ("commits"."status_override" is not null and length(trim(coalesce("commits"."status_override_reason", ''))) > 0 and "commits"."status_override_actor_type" is not null and "commits"."status_override_at" is not null)

concern_graph_nodes_evidence_check.name: concern_graph_nodes_evidence_check
concern_graph_nodes_evidence_check.value: "concern_graph_nodes"."path" is not null or "concern_graph_nodes"."symbol" is not null or "concern_graph_nodes"."marker" is not null

detector_findings_line_range_check.name: detector_findings_line_range_check
detector_findings_line_range_check.value: "detector_findings"."start_line" is null or ("detector_findings"."start_line" > 0 and ("detector_findings"."end_line" is null or "detector_findings"."end_line" >= "detector_findings"."start_line"))

detector_findings_scope_check.name: detector_findings_scope_check
detector_findings_scope_check.value: ("detector_findings"."target_type" = 'version' and "detector_findings"."version_id" is not null and "detector_findings"."version_id" = "detector_findings"."target_id" and "detector_findings"."commit_id" is null and "detector_findings"."commit_file_id" is null and "detector_findings"."diff_block_id" is null) or ("detector_findings"."target_type" = 'commit' and "detector_findings"."commit_id" is not null and "detector_findings"."commit_id" = "detector_findings"."target_id" and "detector_findings"."commit_file_id" is null and "detector_findings"."diff_block_id" is null) or ("detector_findings"."target_type" = 'commit_file' and "detector_findings"."commit_file_id" is not null and "detector_findings"."commit_file_id" = "detector_findings"."target_id" and "detector_findings"."diff_block_id" is null) or ("detector_findings"."target_type" = 'diff_block' and "detector_findings"."diff_block_id" is not null and "detector_findings"."diff_block_id" = "detector_findings"."target_id")

detector_runs_completion_check.name: detector_runs_completion_check
detector_runs_completion_check.value: ("detector_runs"."status" = 'running' and "detector_runs"."completed_at" is null and "detector_runs"."error" is null) or ("detector_runs"."status" = 'succeeded' and "detector_runs"."completed_at" is not null and "detector_runs"."error" is null) or ("detector_runs"."status" = 'failed' and "detector_runs"."completed_at" is not null and length(trim(coalesce("detector_runs"."error", ''))) > 0)
